    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<OpenApiParameter>
    AbstractInvalidPropertyValueRule.mergeParameters(OpenApiOperation node)
    Merges all parameters applicable for an operation - those defined within the operation and those defined at the pathItem level.
